caption: The video appears to be a medical training or educational session, likely focused on surgical procedures. It features a group of medical professionals gathered around an operating table, all dressed in standard surgical attire including scrubs, masks, and caps. The individuals seem to be engaged in a hands-on demonstration or practice, with some actively working on a patient or a simulation model while others observe closely. On the left side of the screen, there is a list of names and titles, indicating the course content creators, directors, instructor, and administrative support, suggesting that this is part of a structured educational program. The presence of a QR code in the bottom right corner implies additional resources or information may be accessible through it. The setting is a well-lit operating room, emphasizing the professional and clinical nature of the activity.
